exam_format: Self-paced online courses with interactive notebooks and final challenges

testing_centers.notes: Certificates are issued upon successful completion of course units, assignments, and challenges. No proctored exam required for most; focus is on hands-on projects submitted via Spaces or the platform.

id_requirements: Hugging Face account (free). No government ID required for course certificates.
exam_rules: Complete required units and pass assessment thresholds (e.g., 80% on quizzes/assignments). Projects are reviewed or auto-graded in many cases.
renewal_options: Certificates do not expire, but course content is regularly updated for new model releases (e.g., new Llama, Mistral versions, Agents features).
target_audience: Students and professionals interested in AI agents
recommended_experience: Basic knowledge of Python and LLMs

prerequisites.description: Basic knowledge of Python and LLMs

retake_policy.notes: Courses are self-paced; you can retake quizzes and resubmit projects as needed.

objectives.title: Explain Tools, Thoughts, Actions, Observations, and their formats
Explain LLMs, messages, special tokens and chat templates
Show a simple use case using python functions as tools
Understand how the fundamentals are implemented in popular libraries: smolagents, LangGraph, LLamaIndex
Build an agent for a selected benchmark and prove your understanding of Agents on the student leaderboard

official_study_resources.title: AI Agents Course Documentation
official_study_resources.notes: The course is free to access.

aliases: ai agents course certificate of completion
hugging face ai agents course certificate of completion
